title: Freezing of Diplonema papillatum
steps: The culture should be in an actively growing state (log phase or exponential growth) to ensure optimum health and good recovery. Ideally, the culture medium should be changed 24 hours prior to harvesting
Label the 1.5ml cryogenic vials and add 200ml of 50% (v/v) glycerol
Add 800ml of active sterile cell culture to this 200ml of 50% (v/v) glycerol, so that overall storage in 10% (v/v) glycerol
Transfer the vials to the controlled freezing unit of at least 1°C/min to retain optimal viability and put the box in -80°C for short storage and in liquid nitrogen for long term storage.
creator: Binnypreet Kaur
